description.value: Aura strong (no school); CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs. Price varies by specific type: Lesser ectoplasmic metamagic rod 3,000 gp Ectoplasmic metamagic rod 11,000 gp Greater ectoplasmic metamagic rod 24,500 gp DESCRIPTION The wielder can cast up to three spells per day that have full effect against incorporeal creatures, as though she were using the Ectoplasmic Spell feat. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, Ectoplasmic Spell Cost varies by specific type: Lesser ectoplasmic metamagic rod 1,500 gp Ectoplasmic metamagic rod 5,500 gp Greater ectoplasmic metamagic rod 12,250 gp
